title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 436.327 - Substantial completion defined
text:
436.327.  Substantial completion defined. — The project shall be deemed to have reached substantial completion upon the occurrence of the earlier of the architect or engineer issuing a certificate of substantial completion in accordance with the terms of the contract documents or the owner accepting the performance of the full contract.
(L. 2002 H.B. 1403)
